task: precise recommendation of suitable planting areas for maize varieties
input: meteorology knowledge graph of maize ecological regions at county scale
output: suitable planting areas (counties) for each maize variety
key_idea: construct a meteorology knowledge graph and use RippleNet to mine spatial correlations between variety suitability and meteorological environments
datasets: 331 maize varieties and agricultural meteorological data from 59 experimental areas in Huang-Huai-Hai ecological region
